hero_subtitle: Family-owned pest control serving the North Shore and Greater Boston. Fast response, proven treatments, and results you can count on.

services_subtitle: From ants to wildlife — comprehensive pest management for homes and businesses across the North Shore.
reviews_subtitle: See why families across Saugus and Greater Boston choose us for reliable, effective pest control.
cta_heading: Pests don't wait. Neither should you.
cta_subtitle: Get a free inspection and customized treatment plan today.
footer_description: Professional pest control serving Saugus and Greater Boston. Residential and commercial extermination, wildlife removal, and preventive treatments. Licensed and insured.

services_featured.name: General Pest Control
services_featured.description: Comprehensive treatment for ants, roaches, spiders, and other household pests. We eliminate the problem and prevent it from coming back.

services_secondary.name: Termite Treatment
services_secondary.description: Protect your biggest investment. Advanced termite detection and elimination with ongoing monitoring to keep your home safe.

services_accent.name: Rodent Control
services_accent.description: Mice and rats don't belong in your home. We seal entry points, trap, and remove rodents — then make sure they stay out.

services_wide.name: Wildlife Removal
services_wide.description: Humane removal of squirrels, raccoons, skunks, and other wildlife. We relocate animals safely and seal your property.

about_features.title: Eco-Friendly Treatments
about_features.description: We use environmentally responsible products that are tough on pests but safe for your family and pets.

about_features.title: Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: Fully licensed by the Commonwealth of Massachusetts. Every technician is trained, certified, and background-checked.

about_features.title: Same-Day Service
about_features.description: Pest emergencies can't wait. Call before noon and we'll be at your door the same day.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Had a terrible ant problem every spring. They came out, treated inside and out, and we haven't seen a single ant since. Fantastic service.

reviews.name: Tom R.
reviews.text: Found mice in our basement and they responded the next morning. Professional, thorough, and sealed up every entry point. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Linda P.
reviews.text: We've used them for years for quarterly treatments. Always on time, always friendly, and our home stays pest-free. Worth every penny.
